steps.title: Find the stated fact
steps.content: The passage explicitly says the Hispanic Society of America is located in New York City and has more than 18,000 objects in its museum collection. A supported statement must stay within those stated details.

steps.title: Reject contradictions and guesses
steps.content: B contradicts the New York City location. C contradicts the 1904 founding date. D invents a comparison about visitor numbers that the passage never provides. The remaining statement repeats the collection size given in the text. The answer is A.
